figures.caption: Table 4: Example predictions on VQA-Scene Dataset. We list the ground truth answer as what recorded by the majority of human annotators. We used the same query on all 3 model generations.

Figure 4: Analysis on layer-wise context vectors of the VLMs trained and tested on VQA Scene Dataset. Layer k’s context vector encodes the model state about what token to generate next, given the question and image.
Table 1: Hyperparameters across NeVA default vs. three LLAMA profiles. Identical values (BF16, TP=1, PP=1, fused adam, etc.) are omitted.
Table 6: Example predictions on Seismic Dataset.
Table 5: Example predictions on ScienceQA Dataset. In the ground truth answer choices, the bold answer is the ground truth. For brevity, we omit the LECTURE block in the prediction text.
